body: You have one flood relief case that needs two follow-up documents and one streetlamp complaint already under review. Ask me what to upload next or request a plain-language case summary.
For this flood relief packet, the fastest way forward is to replace the darker kitchen image and attach your latest bank statement in one follow-up.
This new pothole report already has strong location context. A concise officer summary should mention school traffic risk, lane swerving, and image coverage from both close and wide angles.
